title: pelargonium × cephalanthum
intro: Pelargonium × cephalanthum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Old Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × cephalanthum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of PMS and menopause, thanks to its high content of geraniol and linalool. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
